CustomField.description: For process-level records: the substantive legal, scientific, or factual basis for this determination. Required for administrative record defensibility. For CE findings: the CE code authority (e.g., 43 CFR 46.210(i)). For FONSI: the no-significance analysis summary.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Legal, scientific, or factual basis. Required for administrative record defensibility.
CustomField.label: Determination Basis
